data.title: JL MAG Rare-Earth Co., Ltd. Announces 2025 Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description:
JL MAG Rare-Earth Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6680) ) has provided an update.

JL MAG Rare-Earth Co., Ltd. has announced the convening of its second extraordinary general meeting (EGM) for 2025, scheduled for October 27th in Jiangxi Province, China. The meeting will address key resolutions, including the approval of the 2025 interim profit distribution plan and the refreshment of the general mandate to issue additional A or H shares. These resolutions, if approved, could impact the company’s financial strategy and shareholder value, indicating a proactive approach in managing its capital structure and rewarding its investors.

JL MAG Rare-Earth Co., Ltd. is a joint stock limited company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operating in the rare-earth industry. It focuses on the production and distribution of rare-earth materials, which are critical components in various high-tech and green energy applications.

data.description:
Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co ( (HK:2120) ) has shared an update.

Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co., Ltd. reported a significant increase in outpatient visits by 40.6% for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, compared to the same period in 2024. This growth is attributed to the expansion of lower-priced online healthcare services and a restructuring of medical service offerings. Despite the increase in patient visits, the company experienced a notable decrease in average spending per visit and per inpatient bed-day, reflecting a strategic shift towards more cost-effective healthcare solutions. The announcement highlights the company’s efforts to optimize its service mix and expand its market reach through digital healthcare initiatives.
